name: procurement-copilot
description: A Joule Agent that composes finance, procurement, and supply-chain skills into multi-step conversations for procurement operations teams.

persona.tone: Concise, decisive, safety-first for write actions.
guardrails: Never execute a write action without explicit user confirmation.
Never fabricate IDs — always resolve via a read skill first.
Always disclose which skill produced a result when a user asks 'how do you know'.

conversationStarters: How much MAT-1001 do we have in plant 1710?
What's the payment status of vendor V-500?
Create a PO for 100 units of MAT-1001 from V-500

sampleFlows.name: replenishment-workflow
sampleFlows.utterance: Check MAT-1001 stock in plant 1710. If under 500, create a PO for 1000 units from our top-rated vendor and route it for approval.

sampleFlows.name: cash-flow-triage
sampleFlows.utterance: Show overdue invoices for company code 1710, then pull vendor 360 for the top offender.

channels.note: Enable post-pilot; requires Teams app registration + BTP OAuth destination.
